topic.title: INFO 7375 — Group 1 Finals: Updated Schedule for Today
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Updated schedule for today's Group 1 finals presentations. A few students have moved to later dates, so the lineup has changed.

If you haven't submitted your presentation yet, please do so as soon as possible. The earlier you get it in, the better your chances of getting feedback from me before you present.

Group 1 Schedule, Saturday, April 18, 2026

12:00 — Ankit Deopurkar
12:15 — Mithran Ezhilarasan
12:30 — Harsh Gujarati
12:45 — Swara Joshi

1:00 – 1:15 BREAK

1:15 — Sai Manasa Karanam
1:30 — Myclineshareena Kennedy
1:45 — Manav Kheni

2:00 – 2:15 BREAK

2:15 — Shreya Kini
2:30 — Pratiksha Mohod
2:45 — Minal Naranje

See you at noon.

Thanks, Nina
